title: Adding a new item from the form
excerpt:

Instead of creating an element, like adding a new contact in CRM, we click a button and a mini form opens with selected mandatory info…

posts.author: Arek (Arkadiusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
This function works in Monday CRM, but unfortunately it is not available in Work OS.

Instead of creating an element, like adding a new contact in CRM, we click a button and a mini form opens with selected mandatory information to be completed.

This would make it easier to add tasks correctly - without errors, with the need to add all required fields.

This makes work easier and eliminates errors.
